title: antirrhinum linogriseum
intro: Antirrhinum linogriseum, also known as the downy snapdragon or downy toadflax, is a flowering plant species native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Antirrhinum linogriseum include its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
